rows.label: tlk70000031_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Strewth, you lot look
different 'n you did before.

rows.label: tlk70000031_04_msg0002
rows.name:
Been through the ringer now,
am I right, mates? Chewed up
and spat out an' all that?

rows.label: tlk70000031_04_msg0003
rows.name:
You lot finally ready to take on a
hive of scum and villainy the likes
o' which you never seen before?

rows.label: tlk70000031_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Don't misunderstand. I'm not
looking down on you. I just couldn't
involve mere good-natured people.

rows.label: tlk70000031_04_msg0005
rows.name:
But I will never give up.
I'll find him for sure...
That man.
